structural_claim: The universe exhibits a fundamental threefold replication pattern in its basic constituents

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Nature contains exactly three generations of fermions, a pattern repeated across quarks and leptons

supporting_results.result_name: Precision tests of the Standard Model at LEP
supporting_results.structural_conclusion: The number of light neutrino species is constrained to exactly three
The universe's mass-energy content divides into three fundamental components: baryons (~5%), dark matter (~27%), and dark energy (~68%)
